actions: Multiattack 1 bite + 2 claws. Bite: +7 to hit, 10ft, 2d10+4 piercing + 1d8 acid. Acid Breath (recharge 5-6, 30ft line DEX DC 14 half 11d8 acid).

name: Wyvern
actions: Multiattack 1 bite + 1 sting (or claws when grounded). Bite: +7 to hit, 10ft, 2d6+4 piercing. Claws: +7 to hit, 5ft, 2d8+4 slashing. Stinger: +7 to hit, 10ft, 2d6+4 piercing + CON save DC 15 or 7d6 poison; success half.

name: Pseudodragon
senses: Blindsight 10 ft.; Darkvision 60 ft.; Passive Perception 13
languages: Understands Common Draconic but can't speak
traits: Keen Senses; Magic Resistance; Limited Telepathy.
actions: Bite: +4 to hit, 5ft, 1d4+2 piercing. Sting: +4 to hit, 5ft, 1d4+2 piercing + CON save DC 11 or poisoned 1h (15+: unconscious 1h, ends if damaged or shaken).

name: Goblin
traits: Nimble Escape (Disengage or Hide as bonus action).
actions: Scimitar: +4 to hit, 5ft, 1d6+2 slashing. Shortbow: +4 to hit, range 80/320, 1d6+2 piercing.

name: Hobgoblin
traits: Martial Advantage (1/turn +7 (2d6) damage if ally within 5ft of target and ally not incapacitated).
actions: Longsword: +3 to hit, 5ft, 1d8+1 slashing (1d10+1 two-handed). Longbow: +3 to hit, range 150/600, 1d8+1 piercing.

name: Bugbear
traits: Brute (1 extra die of damage on melee weapon attacks - included in stats); Surprise Attack (extra 7 (2d6) damage on first turn if surprised target).
actions: Morningstar: +4 to hit, 5ft, 2d8+2 piercing. Javelin: +4 to hit, 5ft / 30/120, 2d6+2 (melee) or 1d6+2 (thrown) piercing.

name: Orc
traits: Aggressive (bonus action move up to speed toward visible hostile creature).
actions: Greataxe: +5 to hit, 5ft, 1d12+3 slashing. Javelin: +5 to hit, 5ft / 30/120, 1d6+3 piercing.

name: Kobold
actions: Dagger: +4 to hit, 5ft / 20/60, 1d4+2 piercing. Sling: +4 to hit, range 30/120, 1d4+2 bludgeoning.

name: Gnoll
traits: Rampage (after dropping creature with melee, bonus action half move + bite).
actions: Bite: +4 to hit, 5ft, 1d4+2 piercing. Spear: +4 to hit, 5ft / 20/60, 1d6+2 piercing (1d8+2 two-handed). Longbow: +3 to hit, 150/600, 1d8 piercing.

name: Lizardfolk
actions: Multiattack: bite + heavy club or 2 with javelin. Bite: +4 to hit, 5ft, 1d6+2 piercing. Heavy Club: +4 to hit, 5ft, 1d4+2 bludgeoning. Javelin: +4 to hit, 5ft / 30/120, 1d6+2 piercing. Spiked Shield: +4 to hit, 5ft, 1d6+2 piercing.

name: Hill Giant
actions: Multiattack: 2 greatclubs. Greatclub: +8 to hit, 10ft, 3d8+5 bludgeoning. Rock: +8 to hit, range 60/240, 3d10+5 bludgeoning.

name: Stone Giant
actions: Multiattack: 2 greatclubs. Greatclub: +9 to hit, 15ft, 3d8+6 bludgeoning. Rock: +9 to hit, range 60/240, 4d10+6 bludgeoning + DC 17 STR save or prone.

name: Frost Giant
actions: Multiattack: 2 greataxes. Greataxe: +9 to hit, 10ft, 3d12+6 slashing. Rock: +9 to hit, range 60/240, 4d10+6 bludgeoning.

name: Fire Giant
actions: Multiattack: 2 greatswords. Greatsword: +11 to hit, 10ft, 6d6+7 slashing. Rock: +11 to hit, range 60/240, 4d10+7 bludgeoning.

name: Cloud Giant
traits: Keen Smell; Innate Spellcasting CHA (DC 15): At will: detect magic/fog cloud/light; 3/day: feather fall/fly/misty step/telekinesis; 1/day: control weather/gaseous form.
actions: Multiattack: 2 morningstars. Morningstar: +12 to hit, 10ft, 3d8+8 piercing. Rock: +12 to hit, range 60/240, 4d10+8 bludgeoning.

name: Storm Giant
traits: Amphibious; Innate Spellcasting (DC 17): At will: detect magic/feather fall/levitate/light; 3/day: control weather/water breathing.
actions: Multiattack: 2 greatswords. Greatsword: +14 to hit, 10ft, 6d6+8 slashing. Rock: +14 to hit, range 60/240, 4d12+8 bludgeoning. Lightning Strike (recharge 5-6, 500ft point DC 17 DEX save half 10d8 lightning).

name: Ogre
actions: Greatclub: +6 to hit, 5ft, 2d8+4 bludgeoning. Javelin: +6 to hit, 5ft / 30/120, 2d6+4 piercing.

name: Troll
traits: Keen Smell; Regeneration (10 HP/turn unless damaged with acid or fire); Loathsome Limbs.
actions: Multiattack: 1 bite + 2 claws. Bite: +7 to hit, 5ft, 1d6+4 piercing. Claw: +7 to hit, 5ft, 2d6+4 slashing.

name: Owlbear
actions: Multiattack: 1 beak + 1 claws. Beak: +7 to hit, 5ft, 1d10+5 piercing. Claws: +7 to hit, 5ft, 2d8+5 slashing.

name: Manticore
actions: Multiattack: 3 (1 bite + 2 claw or 3 tail spikes). Bite: +5 to hit, 5ft, 1d8+3 piercing. Claw: +5 to hit, 5ft, 2d4+3 slashing. Tail Spike: +5 to hit, range 100/200, 1d8+3 piercing.

name: Minotaur
traits: Charge (extra 9 piercing + STR DC 14 push 10ft prone); Labyrinthine Recall; Reckless.
actions: Greataxe: +6 to hit, 5ft, 2d12+4 slashing. Gore: +6 to hit, 5ft, 2d8+4 piercing.

name: Centaur
traits: Charge (extra 3d6 piercing if pike used after 30ft straight).
actions: Multiattack: 1 pike + 1 hoof or 2 longbow. Pike: +6 to hit, 10ft, 1d10+4 piercing. Hooves: +6 to hit, 5ft, 2d6+4 bludgeoning. Longbow: +4 to hit, 150/600, 1d8+2 piercing.

name: Harpy
actions: Multiattack: 2 attacks (1 club + 1 claws). Club: +3 to hit, 5ft, 1d4+1 bludgeoning. Claws: +3 to hit, 5ft, 2d4+1 slashing. Luring Song (action 300ft WIS DC 11 or charmed and approach harpy; cannot take reactions; can repeat at end of each turn or when out of 5ft of harpy).

name: Medusa
traits: Petrifying Gaze (60ft start of each creature's turn within 30ft - CON save DC 14: fail = restrained then petrified at end of next turn unless hit by greater restoration).
actions: Multiattack: 1 snake hair + 1 bite or 1 longbow. Snake Hair: +5 to hit, 5ft, 1d4+2 piercing + 4d6 poison. Shortsword: +5 to hit, 5ft, 1d6+2 piercing. Longbow: +5 to hit, 150/600, 1d8+2 piercing + 3d6 poison.

name: Cockatrice
actions: Bite: +3 to hit, 5ft, 1d4+1 piercing + CON save DC 11 or magically begin to turn to stone (restrained); save at end of next turn (success ends; fail = petrified 24h).

name: Basilisk
actions: Bite: +5 to hit, 5ft, 2d6+3 piercing + 2d6 poison.

name: Chimera
actions: Multiattack: 3 (1 bite + 1 horns + 1 claws OR 1 bite + 1 horns + 1 fire breath if available). Bite: +7 to hit, 5ft, 2d6+4 piercing. Horns: +7 to hit, 5ft, 1d12+4 bludgeoning. Claws: +7 to hit, 5ft, 2d6+4 slashing. Fire Breath (recharge 5-6, 15ft cone DEX DC 15 half 7d8 fire).

name: Phase Spider
traits: Ethereal Jaunt (bonus action shift Material/Ethereal); Spider Climb; Web Walker.
actions: Bite: +4 to hit, 5ft, 1d10+2 piercing + CON save DC 11 or 18 (4d8) poison; success half. Reduced to 0: stable + poisoned + paralyzed 1h.

name: Ankheg
senses: Darkvision 60 ft.; Tremorsense 60 ft.; Passive Perception 11
actions: Bite: +5 to hit, 5ft, 2d6+3 slashing + 1d6 acid + grapple (escape DC 13, restrained, can only bite). Acid Spray (recharge 6, 30ft line DEX DC 13 half 3d6 acid).

name: Bulette
senses: Darkvision 60 ft.; Tremorsense 60 ft.; Passive Perception 16
actions: Bite: +7 to hit, 5ft, 4d12+4 piercing. Deadly Leap (action long jump up to 15ft and land in space; creatures STR or DEX save DC 16 or take 3d6 bludgeoning + 3d6 slashing + prone; success = half + 5ft away not prone).

name: Doppelganger
condition_immunities: Charmed
traits: Shapechanger; Ambusher (advantage on attacks vs surprised creature); Surprise Attack (extra 3d6 damage on surprised target).
actions: Multiattack: 2. Slam: +6 to hit, 5ft, 1d6+4 bludgeoning. Read Thoughts (action 60ft target detected; WIS DC 12 save not noticed; advantage on Deception/Persuasion/Intimidation vs target).

name: Pegasus
languages: Understands Celestial Common Elvish Sylvan but can't speak
actions: Hooves: +6 to hit, 5ft, 2d6+4 bludgeoning.

name: Unicorn
condition_immunities: Charmed Paralyzed Poisoned
traits: Charge (extra 9 piercing + DC 15 STR or prone); Innate Spellcasting (DC 14): At will: detect evil and good/druidcraft/pass without trace; 1/day: calm emotions/dispel evil and good/entangle; Magic Resistance; Magic Weapons.
actions: Multiattack: 1 hooves + 1 horn. Hooves: +7 to hit, 5ft, 2d6+4 bludgeoning. Horn: +7 to hit, 5ft, 1d8+4 piercing. Healing Touch (3/day): touch heal 11 (3d8+4) HP and end disease/poison.

name: Imp
damage_resistances: Cold; Bludgeoning Piercing Slashing from nonmagical non-silvered
condition_immunities: Poisoned
actions: Sting (Bite in beast form): +5 to hit, 5ft, 1d4+3 piercing + 3d6 poison. Invisibility (action).

name: Quasit
damage_resistances: Cold Fire Lightning; Bludgeoning Piercing Slashing from nonmagical
condition_immunities: Poisoned
actions: Claws (Bite in beast form): +4 to hit, 5ft, 1d4+3 slashing + CON save DC 10 or 2d4 poison damage and poisoned 1 minute. Scare (1/day): 20ft target WIS DC 10 or frightened 1 minute. Invisibility.

name: Hell Hound
traits: Keen Hearing and Smell; Pack Tactics.
actions: Bite: +5 to hit, 5ft, 1d8+3 piercing + 1d6 fire. Fire Breath (recharge 5-6, 15ft cone DEX DC 12 half 6d6 fire).

name: Succubus/Incubus
damage_resistances: Cold Fire Lightning Poison; Bludgeoning Piercing Slashing from nonmagical
actions: Claw (Fiend Form Only): +5 to hit, 5ft, 1d6+3 slashing. Charm (action 30ft target WIS DC 15 or charmed 24h - obeys verbal/telepathic - end on damage from succubus). Draining Kiss (target charmed/willing: 5d10+5 psychic + HP max reduction; charmed creatures auto fail save). Etherealness.

name: Pit Fiend
damage_resistances: Cold; Bludgeoning Piercing Slashing from nonmagical non-silvered
condition_immunities: Poisoned
traits: Fear Aura; Magic Resistance; Magic Weapons; Innate Spellcasting (CHA DC 21).
actions: Multiattack: 4 (bite + claw + mace + tail). Bite: +14 to hit, 5ft, 4d6+8 piercing + CON save DC 21 or poisoned. Claw: +14 to hit, 10ft, 2d8+8 slashing. Mace: +14 to hit, 10ft, 5d6+8 bludgeoning + 6d6 fire. Tail: +14 to hit, 10ft, 3d10+8 bludgeoning.

name: Dryad
traits: Innate Spellcasting (CHA DC 14): At will: druidcraft; 3/day: entangle/goodberry; 1/day: barkskin/pass without trace/shillelagh; Magic Resistance; Speak with Beasts and Plants; Tree Stride.
actions: Club: +2 (+6 with shillelagh) to hit, 5ft, 1d4 (1d8+4 with shillelagh) bludgeoning. Fey Charm (action humanoid or beast 30ft WIS DC 14 or magically charmed 24h - obey friendly requests; ends on damage; immune for 24h on save).

name: Sprite
actions: Longsword: +2 to hit, 5ft, 1 slashing. Shortbow: +6 to hit, range 40/160, 1 piercing + CON save DC 10 or poisoned 1 minute (success on save; 5+ poisoned 1 minute; less than 5 unconscious until taking damage or another action). Heart Sight; Invisibility.

name: Pixie
traits: Magic Resistance; Innate Spellcasting (CHA DC 12): At will: druidcraft; 1/day each: confusion/dancing lights/detect evil and good/detect thoughts/dispel magic/entangle/fly/phantasmal force/polymorph/sleep.
actions: Superior Invisibility.

name: Satyr
actions: Ram: +3 to hit, 5ft, 2d4+1 bludgeoning. Shortsword: +5 to hit, 5ft, 1d6+3 piercing. Shortbow: +5 to hit, 80/320, 1d6+3 piercing.

name: Air Elemental
damage_resistances: Lightning Thunder; Bludgeoning Piercing Slashing from nonmagical
condition_immunities: Exhaustion Grappled Paralyzed Petrified Poisoned Prone Restrained Unconscious
traits: Air Form (move through 1-inch openings without squeezing).
actions: Multiattack: 2 slams. Slam: +8 to hit, 5ft, 2d8+5 bludgeoning. Whirlwind (recharge 4-6, 15ft sphere; STR DC 13 or 3d8 bludgeoning + flung 20ft).

name: Earth Elemental
condition_immunities: Exhaustion Paralyzed Petrified Poisoned Unconscious
senses: Darkvision 60 ft.; Tremorsense 60 ft.; Passive Perception 10
actions: Multiattack: 2 slams. Slam: +8 to hit, 10ft, 2d8+5 bludgeoning.

name: Fire Elemental
condition_immunities: Exhaustion Grappled Paralyzed Petrified Poisoned Prone Restrained Unconscious
traits: Fire Form (move through 1-inch openings; +1d10 fire on contact); Illumination; Water Susceptibility.
actions: Multiattack: 2 touches. Touch: +6 to hit, 5ft, 2d6+3 fire + ignite (if not wearing magical/protected gear; 1d10 fire each turn until put out).

name: Water Elemental
damage_resistances: Acid; Bludgeoning Piercing Slashing from nonmagical
condition_immunities: Exhaustion Grappled Paralyzed Petrified Poisoned Prone Restrained Unconscious
traits: Water Form; Freeze (cold damage = partially frozen; speed -20).
actions: Multiattack: 2 slams. Slam: +7 to hit, 5ft, 2d8+4 bludgeoning. Whelm (recharge 4-6, 5x10 area STR DC 15 push back; up to 4 medium creatures grappled).

name: Stone Golem
damage_immunities: Poison Psychic; Bludgeoning Piercing Slashing from nonmagical non-adamantine
condition_immunities: Charmed Exhaustion Frightened Paralyzed Petrified Poisoned
languages: Understands languages of creator but can't speak
traits: Immutable Form; Magic Resistance; Magic Weapons.
actions: Multiattack: 2 slams. Slam: +10 to hit, 5ft, 3d8+6 bludgeoning. Slow (recharge 5-6, 10ft 30ft cone WIS DC 17 or speed halved attacks/saves disadvantage 1 minute).

name: Iron Golem
damage_immunities: Fire Poison Psychic; Bludgeoning Piercing Slashing from nonmagical non-adamantine
condition_immunities: Charmed Exhaustion Frightened Paralyzed Petrified Poisoned
languages: Understands creator's languages but can't speak
traits: Fire Absorption; Immutable Form; Magic Resistance; Magic Weapons.
actions: Multiattack: 2 slams. Slam: +13 to hit, 5ft, 3d10+7 bludgeoning. Sword: +13 to hit, 10ft, 3d10+7 slashing. Poison Breath (recharge 6, 15ft cone CON DC 19 half 10d8 poison).

name: Black Pudding
condition_immunities: Blinded Charmed Deafened Exhaustion Frightened Prone
traits: Amorphous; Corrosive Form (creature touching = 4 acid; metal/wood corroded = 1d4 reduction); Spider Climb.
actions: Pseudopod: +5 to hit, 5ft, 1d6+3 bludgeoning + 4d8 acid. Split (when bludgeoning damage and Med+ size and HP ≥10: split into two new puddings).

name: Gelatinous Cube
condition_immunities: Blinded Charmed Deafened Exhaustion Frightened Prone
actions: Pseudopod: +4 to hit, 5ft, 3d6 acid. Engulf (move into space of Large creatures; DEX DC 12 or engulfed - blinded restrained encased in cube; 6d6 acid at start of cube's turns inside).

name: Gray Ooze
condition_immunities: Blinded Charmed Deafened Exhaustion Frightened Prone
actions: Pseudopod: +3 to hit, 5ft, 1d6+1 bludgeoning + 2d6 acid + DEX DC 11 if metal armor or shield: -1 cumulative AC.

name: Ochre Jelly
condition_immunities: Blinded Charmed Deafened Exhaustion Frightened Prone
traits: Amorphous; Spider Climb; Split (lightning or slashing damage when M+ size and HP ≥10: split).
actions: Pseudopod: +4 to hit, 5ft, 2d6+2 bludgeoning + 1d6 acid.
